title: ulmus changii var. kunmingensis
intro: Ulmus changii var. kunmingensis, also known as the Kunming elm, is a deciduous tree species native to China, which is a variation of the Ulmus changii tree. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ulmus changii var. kunmingensis include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Ulmus changii var. kunmingensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, and it is also used in the form of dried leaves and bark in traditional Chinese medicine.
